name: io.github.vicseeai/vicsee-mcp-server
description: MCP server for VicSee — generate, edit, and upscale AI video & images from any agent (Hermes, Claude, Cursor, OpenClaw).

environmentVariables.description: VicSee API key (starts with sk-) from vicsee.com → Settings → API. Requires a paid plan or credit pack.
environmentVariables.name: VICSEE_API_KEY
